Environmental Role: Higher wind disperses pollutants; negative SHAP effect; critical for episode break days.
Temperature inversions trap pollutants at surface; strongest meteo predictor (r=−0.90 with AQI).
High-pressure blocking events cause stagnant air, enabling pollutant accumulation.
High humidity amplifies PM2.5 via hygroscopic growth; also promotes fog-trapping of pollutants.
